allow: Bash(Get-Content app/page.tsx, components/sections/*.tsx, components/layout/*.tsx, components/ui/*.tsx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $cmd.Source } else { "not found" }; winget list --id Gyan.FFmpeg 2>$null | Select-String FFmpeg)
